channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Meta Platforms plans massive stock sale to fund $145B AI investments
item.description: Meta's AI investment strategy may reshape tech funding norms, impacting shareholder value and accelerating AI-driven market transformations. The post Meta Platforms plans massive stock sale to fund $145B AI investments appeared first on Crypto Briefing. [Meta]

item.title: Meta considers raising billions in equity after Alphabet’s record $85B share sale
item.description: Meta's potential equity raise highlights the escalating costs of AI development, impacting investor sentiment and signaling a shift in tech financing. The post Meta considers raising billions in equity after Alphabet’s record $85B share sale appeared first on… [Alphabet, Meta]

item.title: SpaceX signs $30B deal to lease computing capacity to Google
item.description: SpaceX's entry into AI infrastructure with Google deal diversifies its portfolio, potentially stabilizing future IPO prospects with steady revenue. The post SpaceX signs $30B deal to lease computing capacity to Google appeared first on Crypto Briefing. [Alphabet]

item.title: Nvidia and SK hynix to Partner as Jensen Huang Warns Memory Shortage Could ‘Last for Years’
